arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest have an exciting talent on their hands as teenager scores two goals for the B-Team
“I would take him” – Man City star urges club to sign Arsenal & Liverpool target
arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri has made it clear he’d take the signing of Nico Williams for his club amid the Spanish winger being linked with the likes of Arsenal and Liverpool. Williams has shone in La Liga for current club Athletic Bilbao, while he also established himself on the big stage during the summer as […] The post “I would take him” – Man City star urges club to sign Arsenal & Liverpool target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: Manchester City will look to put an end to their dismal run of form when they host Nottingham Forest at the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score pred...

arts.ttl: Man City predicted line-up vs Nottingham Forest as Jeremy Doku starts and star gets new role
arts.sum: Man City will be desperate to get back on track when they welcome Nottingham Forest to the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest transfer news: Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson on radar for January?
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are allegedly contemplating whether to make an approach for Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Belief Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace could be tempted by €25m January signing – May be offered to them
arts.sum: Juventus’ Nicolò Fagioli could be an option for Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace in the winter market. The midfielder isn’t key part of Thiago Motta’s plans at the Serie A side and is limited to four league starts this season. Tuttosport state this hasn’t stopped the 23-year-old from being courted by several English clubs. arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest set their sights on signing 'monster' player
Pep Guardiola responds to Liverpool boss Arne Slot's '115 charges' joke
arts.sum: Arne Slot made a joke about the 115 charges Manchester City are facing, which could result in relegation, after his Liverpool side moved 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man City in race for Frimpong
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City appear set to compete for the signature of Bayer Leverkusen's Jeremie Frimpong, while Manchester United have identified RB Leipzig's David Raum as a potential solution for manager Ruben Amorim at left-back. - Liverpool have identified Bayer Leverkusen right-back Jeremie Frimpong as their No. 1 potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to TeamTalk .
